description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, situated on a corner lot with a paved road wrapping around it. The exterior features a mix of light and dark gray walls, accented by a wooden panel and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The house includes a prominent garage structure attached to one side, with a driveway leading up to it. There is a small, landscaped area with greenery near the main entrance, and a set of exterior stairs leading to the upper level. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, functionality, and integration with the urban environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of gray and wood accents, featuring a garage and landscaped entryway on a corner lot.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, garage, landscaped area, and exterior stairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage structure and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, fewer windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary facade, wooden accent panel, and the paved road wrapping around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and grouped sections
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small landscaped area, and steps leading up to the entrance, no porch or columns, minimal overhang.
